metadata.purpose: Festival, outdoor event, and sporting event targets for HHT cocktail bar hire
metadata.source: Web research — Country & Town House, Mini Travellers, Great British Food Festival, Cowdray Polo, Guards Polo, direct event sites

food_festivals.rationale: Food festivals draw affluent, experience-seeking crowds who buy premium cocktails. Average spend per customer is higher than at music festivals.
food_festivals.outreach_timing: January-March for summer festivals, June-August for autumn events

events.name: Pub in the Park
events.notes: ORPHANED CLIENT — former Cocktail Service venue. Raymond Blanc, James Martin headline. Cocktail bar slot OPEN.
events.contact_approach: Festival director — check website for events team

events.name: The Big Feastival
events.notes: Alex James (Blur) farm in Cotswolds. Live music + exceptional food + cocktails + wines. PRIME target geography.

events.name: Taste of London
events.notes: Pop-ups from top restaurants, champagne bars, cocktails. Premium audience.

events.name: Meatopia
events.notes: Dedicated to meat + live fire cooking, craft beers + cocktails. Already has cocktail bar slots.

events.name: Great British Food Festival
events.notes: CIRCUIT of 10+ events. Englefield (Berkshire), Ragley (Warwickshire), Bowood (Wiltshire), Loseley (Surrey) all in TARGET geography. One deal = multiple events.
events.contact_approach: Central organiser — one relationship covers all venues

events.name: Blenheim Palace Food Festival
events.notes: ORPHANED CLIENT venue. Artisan food + wine tasting, chef demos. Cocktail bar opportunity.
events.contact_approach: Blenheim events team — already orphaned client contact

events.name: Abergavenny Food Festival
events.notes: 150+ exhibitors, Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall, Jamie Oliver. Premium audience.

events.name: Maldon Food and Drink Festival
events.notes: Growing festival, Essex location, cocktail bar opportunity

country_shows.rationale: Traditional country shows draw affluent rural audiences. Cocktail bars are a premium upgrade from standard beer tents.

events.name: Royal County of Berkshire Show
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Traditional county show, hospitality area needs premium bar.

events.name: Surrey County Show
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Premium cocktail bar in food/drink area.

events.name: South of England Show
events.notes: Major agricultural show, large food/drink area, corporate hospitality

events.name: Bucks County Show
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Family-friendly but with food/drink area.

events.name: CLA Game Fair
events.notes: Flagship countryside event. Premium audience, huge hospitality area.

events.name: Henley Royal Regatta
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Ultra-premium audience. Corporate hospitality. Cocktail bar demand.

polo_racing_cricket.rationale: Wealthy sporting audiences = premium cocktail spend. Hospitality boxes and member events need bar services.

events.name: Cowdray Gold Cup Polo
events.notes: Home of British Polo. Luxury retail village, artisan food outlets, bars. Pagoda hospitality (20 guests each).

events.name: Cartier Queen's Cup Polo
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY (Berkshire). Most prestigious polo trophy in England. Champagne reception + lunch. Searcys VIP.

events.name: Royal Ascot
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Ultimate premium event. Corporate hospitality suites need cocktail bars.

events.name: Glorious Goodwood
events.notes: 5-day festival. Corporate hospitality, private boxes, champagne bars.

events.name: Henley Festival
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Black-tie floating stage festival. Ultra-premium audience. Cocktail bars essential.

outdoor_cinema_garden_parties.rationale: Growing market — outdoor cinema + premium drinks = perfect cocktail bar fit. Garden parties at estates need bar hire.

events.name: Luna Cinema
locations: Multiple — Blenheim Palace, Kew Gardens, Hampton Court, Leeds Castle, Warwick Castle, etc.
events.notes: Screen films at iconic venues. Cocktail bar concession opportunity. Multiple TARGET geography locations.

events.name: The Nomad Cinema
events.notes: Pop-up outdoor cinema at unusual locations. Mobile bar partnership.

events.name: Glyndebourne
events.notes: Ultra-premium audience. Picnic interval = cocktail opportunity. Sussex borders Surrey.

events.name: Wilderness Festival
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY (Oxfordshire). Boutique festival, premium audience, cocktail bars + dining.

private_estate_events.rationale: Private estates hosting seasonal open days, garden parties, and charity events often need external bar services

events.name: Highclere Castle (Downton Abbey)
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Downton Abbey castle. Corporate events, charity galas, seasonal events.

events.name: Waddesdon Manor
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Rothschild collection. Christmas Fair = huge bar opportunity.

events.name: Cliveden House Events
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. National Trust property, luxury hotel. Events + corporate.

events.name: Stonor Park
events.notes: TARGET GEOGRAPHY. Annual events programme, corporate hire, wedding hire.

bbc_good_food.rationale: ORPHANED CLIENT — former Cocktail Service venue. Major food show circuit with cocktail bar concession slot open.

events.name: BBC Good Food Show
events.notes: ORPHANED CLIENT — former Cocktail Service venue. Multiple shows per year. Massive audience. Cocktail masterclass + bar concession.
events.contact_approach: BBC Good Food Show events/partnerships team
